title: caladenia flava subsp. sylvestris
intro: Caladenia flava subsp. sylvestris, commonly known as the yellow spider orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Caladenia flava subsp. sylvestris include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for topical application, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential allergic reactions and the lack of extensive scientific research on its effects.
